feedback.technicalIssues: No, I didn't encounter any issues.
feedback.confusingParts: A few of the games were a little tricky to understand, like the one where you have to attack the monsters. But most were very easy to understand.
feedback.suggestions: Perhaps make the time per game a little longer. It felt like when I started to make progress, the time was out.
feedback.funCriteria: If the game felt exciting, interesting and addictive I felt like that contributed to it feeling fun to play. Also, if I felt disappointed that my time ran out, that would also mean I was having a good time.
